title: oenothera biennis subf. latifolia
intro: Oenothera biennis subf. latifolia, commonly known as evening primrose, is a biennial plant in the family Onagraceae. The plant's roots and seeds are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, anticoagulant, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera biennis subf. latifolia include relief from symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), menopausal hot flashes, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as potential benefits for heart health and immune function. Herbal preparations of evening primrose, including capsules, oils, and topical creams, are available for use in supplementing the diet and promoting overall well-being.
